title: Restore a degraded IPSec/MPLS overlay tunnel
trigger_signature: Intermittent tunnel_loss_pct/tunnel_jitter_ms spikes, irregular tunnel_rekey_interval_s, BFD flaps on an overlay tunnel.

actions.description: Collect tunnel, LSP, BFD statistics and the IPSec rekey log.
actions.command_or_guidance: show interface tunnel-hub ; show mpls lsp ; show bfd session ; show crypto ipsec sa rekey-history
actions.verification: Loss/jitter bursts and rekey events captured with timestamps.

actions.description: Localise the faulty LSP / underlay hop by correlating loss bursts with a specific P-router or path.
actions.command_or_guidance: correlate tunnel loss timestamps with per-hop LSP stats over the topology graph
actions.verification: Degraded underlay hop or LSP identified.

actions.description: Reroute the LSP onto a healthy TE path that avoids the degraded underlay hop.
actions.command_or_guidance: napalm load_merge: mpls traffic-eng / tunnel-te1 path-option 1 explicit name HEALTHY-PATH
actions.rollback: napalm: restore the original LSP path-option
actions.verification: tunnel_loss_pct and tunnel_jitter_ms recover to baseline and hold for 5 minutes.

actions.description: Fail the tunnel over to the backup transport if the primary underlay cannot be made healthy quickly.
actions.command_or_guidance: controller: set overlay tunnel-hub preferred-transport backup
actions.rollback: controller: fail back to primary transport once underlay is healthy
actions.verification: Overlay SLA restored on the backup transport; no loss/jitter.
